acceptance_criteria.text: Backend endpoint /api/services/seo-audit returns service quality summary.
proof: Added get_services_seo_audit and shared quality audit helpers.

acceptance_criteria.text: UI shows quality summary and needs-review filter.
proof: CardOverviewPage renders quality counters and CardServicesFilterBar supports qualityFilter.

acceptance_criteria.text: Problem reasons are shown next to services.
proof: CardServicesTable renders service quality issue labels.
useCardServiceController builds instructions from issue codes.
Added /services_audit command and service audit card-menu callback.

acceptance_criteria.text: Regression tests cover service quality audit.
proof: Backend and frontend targeted tests cover quality helpers.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m py_compile src/core/service_keyword_scoring.py src/api/services_api.py src/telegram_bot.py src/main.py
server endpoint smoke for /api/services/seo-audit auth gate
server docker compose ps, logs, curl -I, telegram service status
known_gaps: Full frontend TypeScript check fails on pre-existing unrelated project-wide errors; production build passes.
